diagrams.title: Divide and Conquer Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows the three-step process: Divide problem into subproblems, Conquer by solving recursively, Combine merged solutions
diagrams.purpose: Understand the basic framework of D&C algorithm design

diagrams.title: Merge Sort Recursion Tree
diagrams.description: Binary tree showing how Merge Sort divides and merges, with work at each level
elements: Total levels: log n, Work per level: n
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why Merge Sort is O(n log n)

diagrams.title: Quick Sort Partitioning
diagrams.description: Array partitioning around pivot showing elements less than pivot on left, greater on right

diagrams.title: Closest Pair Divide and Conquer
diagrams.description: 2D plane with vertical line dividing points, strip in middle for cross-boundary pairs
elements: Points in strip sorted by y-coordinate
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how to find closest pair across divided regions
